meta.note_on_cf_normalization: normalized_cf_stripped_byte_length uses FULL normalization (script+type+event-guard prefixes+data-cf-modified attrs); cf_stripped_bytes_script_and_type_only is the narrower rocket-loader-only figure.

ordering_and_limits_inferred.main_grid: 42 video cards, newest-first (datePublished desc: 2026-04-18 ... 2026-03-02). Page 1 of 1239.
ordering_and_limits_inferred.main_grid_eager_window: first 6 cards eager-loaded (direct src); remaining 36 lazy (data-original). Aligns with lazyThreshold=2000 / ~2 visible rows.
ordering_and_limits_inferred.top_pornstars: 6 entries, 'This Week's Best' (likely weekly top by views); refreshable via #ajax_pornstars.
ordering_and_limits_inferred.tags: 20 tag links (fixed set, not paginated); refreshable via #ajax_tags.
ordering_and_limits_inferred.watching_now: 12 cards SSR; live 'currently watched' set, refreshable via refresh_watching_now() / update_watching_now AJAX.

diff_risks_vs_local_index_html.inspected_file: templates/index.html (local main byte span 82549..87150, ~4.6KB template vs live main 121167 bytes rendered)
risks: MISSING SECTIONS: local <main> renders only main_video_grid + pagination + desc-text. It does NOT render Top Pornstars, Top Channels, Related Tags, or Watching-Now. All 4 live sections are absent from local markup (their CSS rules exist in <style>, but no markup). This is the largest structural parity gap.

EAGER CARD VARIANT MISSING: local emits ONE card variant (lazy: gif placeholder + data-original + <noscript>) for all cards. Live uses 6 eager cards (direct src + itemprop=contentUrl, NO data-original/noscript) + 36 lazy. Byte parity impossible for first 6 cards.

COMMENTACTION INTERACTIONSTATISTIC MISSING: local card has only one interactionStatistic (WatchAction, content={{v.views}}). Live adds a SECOND <div itemprop=interactionStatistic CommentAction content=<comment_count>> whenever comments>0 (omitted when 0). Local omits it entirely.

VIEW COUNT DUAL REPRESENTATION: live shows rounded label (tview '118K') but exact integer in userInteractionCount (118407). Local must supply both a rounded label and an exact integer; verify v.views vs v.views_label() mapping.

ROCKET-LOADER HASH MISMATCH: local template bakes hash 602cd38cd0a3aa1adcef57de; live hash is e5ce1c236f08498d926462c6. Per-zone/per-time hash; byte comparison MUST normalize any *-text/javascript hash or every <script> tag differs.

CF EVENT-GUARD INJECTIONS: live injects 'if (!window.__cfRLUnblockHandlers) return false; ' into onclick/onMouseMove/onMouseOut and adds data-cf-modified-<hash>-="" attrs (42 handler injections on homepage). Local static mirror has these baked with the OLD hash. Normalization required; otherwise tags hover + watching-now refresh markup diverges.

H1 / TOPTEXT / DESC TEXT ARE DATA-BOUND locally ({{ctx.page.h1}}, {{page.seo_intro}}, {{page.seo_footer}}); live values are 'Top Trending Free Porn Videos', the toptext paragraph, and the desc-text paragraph. Ensure seed data matches these exact strings.

PAGINATION PAGE-1 SHAPE: live page 1 has NO '‹ Prev' (only Next ›), shows 1(active),2-9,…,1239. Local {% if item.is_previous() %} branch must be suppressed on page 1 (appears correct) and total page count (1239) must come from data.

THUMB_CSS_CLASS: local uses class="{{ v.thumb_css_class() }}"; live main-grid cards are exactly 'thumb vid' and cat cards are 'thumb cat'. Ensure helper emits bare 'thumb vid'/'thumb cat' with no extra classes (no not-wide on homepage).

uncertainty: Eager card count = 6 inferred from 'no data-original' split; root cause (fixed count vs lazyThreshold/viewport) not confirmed from source. Stable across fetch but could vary with device/geo cookies (is_mob=0, iso_c=DE).
Content is geo/personalized via cookies (iso_c, alpha, seb_n, mkr_ch, biz_rng); a different geo or mobile UA may change card set, eager window, or section contents. This capture is desktop/DE.

CF-stripped byte length (206294 base; lower with full handler/attr stripping) is an estimate of origin HTML; true origin bytes unobtainable behind Cloudflare. The 526-byte figure covers rocket-loader script + type attrs only; full normalization (handlers + data-cf-modified) removes more.
Tag hrefs use root slugs (/rough-sex) which on pornsok resolve as category pages; whether the data model treats these as 'tags' or 'categories' is a modeling decision, not certain from HTML alone.
